approaches.title: Iterative Accumulation with Tracking
approaches.summary: Track current and maximum altitude by iterating through gains and updating values.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial implementation using iterative accumulation with explicit tracking of current and maximum altitude.

approaches.title: Functional-Style Scan with Maximum
approaches.summary: Use Rust's scan iterator to compute running altitudes and find the maximum.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Refactored to use functional-style scan iterator, computing running altitudes and extracting the maximum value.
